title: oxera crassifolia
intro: Oxera crassifolia, also known as the New Caledonia oxera, is a plant species in the family Lamiaceae, which is native to New Caledonia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Oxera crassifolia include its potential to treat respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and reduce fever. Oxera crassifolia can be prepared in various herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
